---
title: Balancing Efficiency and Flexibility for DNN Acceleration via Temporal GPU-Systolic
  Array Integration
author:
- Cong Guo
- Yangjie Zhou
- Jingwen Leng
- Yuhao Zhu
- Zidong Du
- Quan Chen
- Chao Li
- Bin Yao
- Minyi Guo
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2002.08326.pdf
talk_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/dac20-slides.pdf
journ: DAC
year: 2020
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 36
---
